description: ANALYST proposes VERIFICATION_REQUIRED disposition for TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001. CLOUD_CODE has completed second re-execution of smoke validation (commit bc30f68e579928219a9b57c4f295f6113430eb39), confirming all five autonomous loop integrity checks pass: (1) auditor-runner.yml dispatch role filter active (commit 3300a85e615bdc5cfab23a9d6b1f305e730ad4c5); (2) server-side current_task.json update gated on PRE_ACTION_APPROVED present (commit cd1ab93d0761da8b98103b9d3291026eb7946fae); (3) analyst-verifier-runner.yml with workflow_dispatch inputs and AUDITOR routing present (commit 43b41dc8735d211c6773c8a34307150cd1917d26); (4) governance/ledger/ contains valid ACTION_COMPLETED entries for TASK-P3-0011 and TASK-P3-0012 with schema v162 and correct commit SHAs; (5) no unresolved VERIFICATION_REQUIRED events remain for P3 tasks. governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json has been updated with current timestamp and pass status. ANALYST asserts all autonomous loop integrity criteria are satisfied. AUDITOR must perform independent inspection of governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json and referenced workflow files on main branch and issue VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED to close this task and advance to next roadmap phase, or VERIFICATION_FAILED with explicit failure reason if criteria are not met.
proof_target: governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json with pass status across all five validation checks, confirmed via independent AUDITOR inspection of main branch workflow files and ledger entries referenced in commit bc30f68e579928219a9b57c4f295f6113430eb39
